title: dryopteris glaucostipes
intro: Dryopteris glaucostipes, also known as Chinese wood fern, is a species of fern native to China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as protecting against certain types of cancer. Dryopteris glaucostipes can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues, from respiratory problems to digestive issues.
